scope: canonical B8 custom rule plugin fixture

inputContract: input components are measured python-module ids
boundary tags are provided by repository-local policy metadata
outputContract: records unmatched tags as unsupported plugin coverage
coverageAssumptions: tag metadata covers only files selected by the fixture
missing tags are not measured-zero boundary evidence
nonConclusions: custom rule plugin registry is tooling validation, not a Lean theorem
plugin output does not conclude architecture lawfulness
plugin output does not conclude a Lean theorem claim
plugin evidence does not turn unsupported gaps into measured-zero evidence
formal claim promotion requires explicit theorem precondition checks

inputContract: workflow diagrams are supplied as bounded manual annotations
diagram nodes are mapped to measured component ids
outputContract: emits semantic workflow evidence for selected paths
keeps unmapped workflow nodes as unsupported constructs
coverageAssumptions: manual workflow evidence covers only the selected fixture diagram
diagram commutation is not inferred for unmapped paths
requiredTheoremPreconditions: AIR semantic diagram evidence is exact for the selected workflow
theorem precondition checker reports no missing semantic diagram preconditions
nonConclusions: custom rule plugin registry is tooling validation, not a Lean theorem
plugin output does not conclude architecture lawfulness
plugin output does not conclude a Lean theorem claim
plugin evidence does not turn unsupported gaps into measured-zero evidence
formal claim promotion requires explicit theorem precondition checks

explicitAssumptions: plugins run over a selected measurement universe
plugin outputs are AIR evidence or report metadata until theorem preconditions are checked
